headline: Clean Energy Index Jumps 61% After BlackRock CIO's Contrarian Call

headline: Trump Mulls Jones Act Waiver To Combat Iran-Related Oil Supply Snarls: Report
summary: The Trump administration is considering a temporary waiver of the Jones Act to enable the smooth transit of energy and agricultural shipments between U.S. ports.
